entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION (MAS)
entities.description: A selection method that exploits markers associated with traits of interest to select lines with superior alleles.

entities.name: MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers associated with traits of interest used for selecting superior alleles.

entities.name: SIMPLE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that can be effectively handled by marker-assisted selection.

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Traits that are difficult to handle with MAS but can be addressed by genomic selection.

entities.name: GENOMICS TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies that reduce the cost of genotyping and enable the use of genome-wide marker data.

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE MARKER DATA
entities.description: Large-scale genetic marker data used to estimate breeding values in genomic selection.

entities.name: BREEDING VALUE
entities.description: The genetic value of an individual that can be passed to its offspring.

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION (GS)
entities.description: A modern breeding approach that uses genome-wide marker data to estimate breeding value and address complex traits.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING DATA
entities.description: Data regarding the observable characteristics of a training population.

entities.name: TRAINING POPULATION
entities.description: A group of individuals used to train prediction models in genomic selection.

entities.name: PREDICTION MODELS
entities.description: Models trained using genotyping and phenotyping data to calculate the genomic estimated breeding value.

entities.name: GENOMIC ESTIMATED BREEDING VALUE (GEBV)
entities.description: The breeding value estimated using genomic selection and prediction models.

entities.name: GENETIC GAINS
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a population over time, enhanced by GS.

entities.name: GENOTYPING PLATFORMS
entities.description: Cost-effective tools used to generate large-scale genotyping data.

entities.name: CROP SPECIES
entities.description: Various types of crops where genomic selection is deployed for improvement.

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of enhancing crop traits through breeding methods like GS.
